# CWE-283 — Unverified Ownership (vulnerable)
lang: go
file: CWE-283-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: deletes user file without confirming the inode owner matches caller.
func DeleteUserFile(c *gin.Context) {
	path := c.Query("path")
	_ = os.Remove(path)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"removed": path})
}
